description: Electron app (OverwolfElectron or standard). Renderer tested via the browser tool ($BROWSER_TOOL: Chrome-MCP in Edge when connected, else Preview — no computer-use). Packaged-app final test requires Must-Ask trigger 'packaged_electron_final_test' — only then is computer-use authorized for that specific final step.

tool_chain.purpose: Start Electron in dev mode so the renderer is reachable via the browser tool

tool_chain.tool: $BROWSER_TOOL probe — Chrome-MCP (Edge, if connected) → Preview → Playwright
tool_chain.purpose: Resolve the active browser tool for the localhost renderer. Chrome-MCP (Edge) stays primary when the extension is connected; otherwise Preview is primary (the renderer dev server is a localhost origin Preview can attach to). Playwright is the next fallback. Never computer-use for the renderer (see deep-knowledge/browser-tool-strategy.md).
Verify renderer DOM content and element presence

tool_chain.tool: $BROWSER_TOOL console + network read (read_console_messages + read_network_requests / browser_console_messages + browser_network_requests / preview_console_logs)
tool_chain.purpose: Catch renderer runtime JS errors and failed requests
Capture rendered visual layout of the renderer window
Testing the packaged (built) binary requires computer-use. Only proceed after must-ask trigger 'packaged_electron_final_test' is confirmed by user.
